task.zh: 波浪驾驶！让小车的位置像波浪一样起伏——加速、减速、再加速！
task.en: Wave driving! Make the car's position go up and down like a wave!

hints.zh: 上升 = 前进（正速度），下降 = 后退（负速度）
hints.en: Rising = forward (positive speed), falling = backward (negative speed)

hints.zh: 曲线最高点的速度是零——就像抛球到最高点的瞬间
hints.en: Speed is zero at the peak — like a ball at the top of its throw
